title: LCMRP Evidence Record
description: Product-independent contract for recording evidence without conflating a completed run, a supported claim, or a maturity transition.

immutable_record_notice.const: This evidence record is immutable. Corrections or new decisions must create a new record version that references the superseded record.

prerequisite_evidence.description: Explicit evidence-chain references used when recommending high maturity states. Empty arrays mean the prerequisite has not been demonstrated.

evidenceDecision.description: One bounded decision for one evidence label. Labels form an evidence profile, not a total maturity ordering.

resulting_evidence_profile.description: The complete bounded profile after applying the final action. For PENDING decisions this is the proposed profile and awards nothing.

disclaimer.const: Content in this section is provisional and does not constitute an architectural decision, implementation commitment, roadmap recommendation, or claim of production readiness.
